entities.name: MILLETS
entities.description: Grains characterized by a low glycemic index used to manage blood glucose levels

entities.name: GLYCEMIC INDEX
entities.description: A measure of how quickly a carbohydrate-containing food raises blood glucose levels

entities.name: FASTING BLOOD SUGAR
entities.description: The concentration of glucose in the blood after a period of fasting

entities.name: POST-PRANDIAL BLOOD SUGAR
entities.description: The concentration of glucose in the blood after eating

entities.name: GLYCATED HEMOGLOBIN
entities.description: A marker of average blood glucose levels over several months, also known as HbA1c

entities.name: TYPE 2 DIABETES
entities.description: A metabolic disorder characterized by high blood sugar and insulin resistance

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A comprehensive review of literature to synthesize evidence on a specific research question

entities.name: META-ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method to combine results from multiple studies

entities.name: DIFFERENCE-IN-DIFFERENCES
entities.description: A statistical technique used to estimate the causal effect of a treatment by comparing changes over time

entities.name: STANDARDIZED MEAN DIFFERENCE
entities.description: A measure of effect size used to compare means across different studies

entities.name: STAPLE DIETS
entities.description: Common primary food sources used as a control group in the study
